Katipunan traffic grabe today. Sir Reyes was late again.

Sunken Garden vibes today, ang ganda ng weather sa Diliman.

Looking for an org sa Morayta. Sino ba dito member ng Tamaraws?

Wala nang jeep sa Los Baños tapos may exam pa! Mt Makiling weather is terrible.

#SLUFreedomWall25117

Hello po sa mga tiga SLU! Ask lang if pwede pa ba magchange of course? Maryheights area ako nakatira. Email: student.id@slu.edu.ph or call +639171234567 student number 20210123

#SLUFreedomWall25118

Haaaaaay sobrangggg pagod na ako sa Maryheights, hindi ko na alam kung kakayanin ko pa. Submitted: Anonymous student
Comparing ADMU vs DLSU acad standards — Ateneo wins on humanities, La Salle on business sa tingin ko.
Generic post na walang school identifier. Just a regular complaint about thesis stress.

#SLUFreedomWall25119

Maria Cruz sent me a love letter today, I dont know what to do!
Generic post na walang school identifier. Just a regular complaint about thesis stress.
The English-only post talking about midterms and exam stress without any Tagalog particles whatsoever in the entire body of the message.
Pure tagalog na post: ang hirap talaga ng buhay-estudyante kasi puro deadline at requirements naman lahat.
